title: BridgeInvariant
description: Single protocol invariant (embedded in atg.json or validated standalone). Module 1 output; consumed by Module 2 + 3.

predicate.description: Human/LLM-readable predicate over global bridge state

solidity_assertion.description: Executable-style assertion text for checker / codegen

related_edges.description: ATG edge_id values this invariant depends on
